articles.author: William Earl
articles.title: WGA Cancels L.A. Award Show Due to Staff Strike - variety.com
articles.description: The Writers Guild of America West has canceled its annual L.A. award show, though the show will go on in New York.
articles.content:
The Writers Guild of America West has canceled its annual award show in downtown L.A., as its staff remains on strike.
“I am writing to share the news that the 2026 Writers Guild Awards Los Angeles … [+5425 chars]
